20260426-170000_ps1-chip-prompt-starship.task: Configure PS1 prompt to match reference image

criteria.description: Conda chip present in format string when env active [E]
Pyenv/python chip shown with `>_` prefix icon [E]
User@host chip shows in cyan (#8be9fd) always [E]
Shell chip shows `>_` icon and shell name in white [E]
Node.js chip shows version with node icon [E]
Directory chip shows path in pink/magenta with folder icon [E]
Git branch chip shows branch name in purple/violet color [E]
Git status chip format matches `N • +X -Y` style [E]
Kubernetes chip shows context with globe icon [E]
GitHub PR chip shows `PR #N` in cyan with github icon [E]
All chips have visible border/bracket chars around content [E]
No robbyrussell `➜` prompt character visible [E]
No chip shows broken glyph `?` or empty box [E]

20260428-johannes-azure-dashboard-failur.task: Research Azure cost dashboard failures and anti-patterns

criteria.description: [E] Top 5 mistakes section enumerates exactly five distinct mistakes
[E] Each mistake includes a contrarian framing not just a generic warning
[E] Each mistake cites observable evidence or industry source pattern
[E] KPI section separates "requested but ignored" from "drives decisions"
[E] Requested-but-ignored KPI list contains at least 5 entries
[E] Decision-driving KPI list contains at least 5 entries
[E] Dashboard overload section gives concrete tile count threshold
[E] Tile count threshold cites cognitive load or industry benchmark basis
[E] Data quality section enumerates at least 5 distinct issues
[E] Data quality issues include Azure-specific examples not generic BI issues
[E] Overrated metrics list contains at least 5 entries
[E] Underrated metrics list contains at least 5 entries
[E] Output uses PAI format with all required sections
[E] Story Explanation contains exactly 8 numbered points
[E] COMPLETED line is 12 words or fewer
[I] Voice notification sent before final response
[I] Contrarian perspective challenges at least 3 popular narratives explicitly
[I] Long-term vs short-term truth distinction made explicit
[R] Recommendations actionable for Hypera FinOps PBI project context
Anti — no political bias inserted into analysis
Anti — no fabricated statistics presented as fact
Anti — no vendor marketing language ("synergy", "leverage transformation")
Anti — no recommendations to ADD complexity without evidence
